title: Stir Fry with Caramelized Peaches and Tempeh
description: A sweet and savory stir-fry made with tempeh, peaches, and a hint of Asian spices.

ingredients.name: peach
ingredients.notes: canned peaches can be used as a substitute

ingredients.name: tempeh
ingredients.notes: marinated in soy sauce and maple syrup

instructions: Marinate tempeh in a mixture of soy sauce and maple syrup for at least 30 minutes.
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add ginger and garlic to the skillet and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add tempeh to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until golden brown.
Add peaches to the skillet and stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions.
